name: @speedora/editing-rhythm
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Editing Rhythm - a COMPOSITE signal derived from other signals' already-computed output (Scene Intelligence's cuts/motion-energy, Audio Intelligence's speaking rate), not a fresh subprocess/ffmpeg detector of its own. calculateTempo/calculatePacing/calculateAcceleration are independently exported and testable; deriveEditingRhythmFeatures() orchestrates them. No DB/queue access at all; see root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/worker's render-clip adapter and @speedora/fusion-engine.
